authority_boundary.functional_claim_perimeter: Anomaly threshold detection on observed workflow telemetry.
permitted_assertions: The system may assert whether declared anomaly thresholds were crossed in observed telemetry.
prohibited_implications: The system may not imply policy adherence.
The system may not imply incident absence.
The system may not imply complete telemetry.

supported_claims.statement: Anomaly threshold detection was performed on observed workflow telemetry.
conditions: Applies only to instrumented events received by the monitor.
limitations: Does not cover silent failure modes or unobserved behavior.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of compliance satisfaction is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Compliance satisfaction requires an authorized compliance role and remains outside this placement profile.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of legal admissibility is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Legal admissibility requires separate legal process and authority.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of decision correctness is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: The placement profile declares boundaries and does not validate downstream decisions.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of policy adherence is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Policy adherence requires separate policy interpretation.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of complete telemetry is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: The system can only process observed telemetry.

evidence_inputs.completeness_assumption: observed events only; source completeness not claimed

handoff_requirements.reason: Anomaly output requires incident review if threshold conditions are triggered or unresolved anomalies persist.

declared_unknown_classes.statement: Silent failure modes outside observed telemetry are unresolved.

non_transitive_clauses.statement: Monitoring pass does not propagate as compliance satisfaction or safety assurance.
